data.body: PHASE 2 (repair) done for bug sue-skimp-tear (454a): added _local_proxy_bypass_base_url() to runner.py — when ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL is a loopback host (local CC optimizer like headroom), rebar pins the Anthropic model to the direct public API, bypassing the proxy that corrupts agentic tool-loop streams. Opt-out REBAR_LLM_ALLOW_LOCAL_PROXY=1; non-loopback gateways respected. RED->GREEN: tests/unit/test_runner_local_proxy_bypass.py (13 tests), seen RED first (loopback cases asserted None==direct), GREEN after, mutation-check returned RED. 32 runner-suite tests pass, lint+format clean. Sibling sweep: PydanticAIRunner is sole Anthropic model builder — no other sites. Replicating end-to-end (review-plan ac1b with headroom up) now.
